Our story

From the airport to forever

Het & Diya  ✦  Since December 2021

✈️ Dec 2021

The airport night

It all started at the airport on 15 December 2021. One look and nothing was ever the same again.

🌸 Early 2022

University days

Walking the same halls, sitting together — university became our favourite place because you were there.

💬 2022

Hey Batak!

The nickname that only I call you. Batak — silly, sweet, and completely yours. It still makes me smile every time.

🏠 2022–2023

Our little home

The place where we laughed the loudest, talked the longest, and felt the most at home — because we had each other.

❤️ Always

Every ordinary day

No big event needed. Just you, just me, just every simple moment that quietly became my whole world.

🎂 5 May 2025

Your 21st birthday

Today you turn 21, Diya. And I just want you to know — every single day with you has been my greatest gift.

❤️

Every chapter of our story has been my favourite. Here is to many more, Batak. Happy 21st. 🌹

Het  ✦  Diya
